diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export, type re-exports (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, Context, HonoRequest, client types)
+- Internal names noticed: Hono, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, Context
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point that wires together the framework exports from submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: 53 lines, re-exports Hono from ./hono and types from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Schema, Input, Context, HonoRequest, ClientRequest, Infer types, HTTPExceptionError, Handler types
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPResponseError, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, ValidationTargets, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for Hono's request handling, schemas, context, and client
+- Copy-safe detail: TypeScript types defining environment schemas, request contexts, client request/response inference
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class extending HonoBase with router initialization
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that sets up default SmartRouter and extends HonoBase
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, Hono class constructor initializes router from SmartRouter fallback option
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class, get/patch/post/put/delete/etc route handlers, onError, basePath app mount
+- Internal names noticing: HonoOptions, errorHandler, NotFoundHandler, routeIndex, router
+- Imports or neighbors: ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Base Hono class implementing request routing, middleware composition, and handler orchestration
+- Copy-safe detail: 440+ lines, app.mount(), route handling via router, middleware dispatch through compose(), error handling chain
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, get/error/header/status/set etc methods, req, res properties
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, ExecutionContext
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception
+- Plain-English summary: Request context providing method handlers, request/response access, and execution state
+- Copy-safe detail: Core Context class with chained route handlers, req for request access, res for response, throw error methods
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, headers, matches, url accessor methods
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT, HonoRequest interface
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants
+- Plain-English summary: Client-side request object providing header access, URL info, and request matching results
+- Copy-safe detail: Request object with get(), matches(), url(), throw HTTPException on failures, body consumption guard
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Single constant file holding the unique symbol for request match result
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, exports GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: Body types for form data handling with dot and all options
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValue
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript types defining body parsing behavior for nested form data structures
+- Copy-safe detail: Generic type definitions for FormData-like body values with optional dot notation and array expansion
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose() middleware orchestration function
+- Internal names noticed: compose, dispatch, index, handler, res, context.error, finalized
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types (Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler)
+- Plain-English summary: Koa-style middleware composition returning a dispatch function that manages request chain execution
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, compose() takes middleware array and handlers, returns dispatch function with index tracking and error/notFound delegation
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, getResponse() method
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Throw-able HTTP error class with status code and optional response object for custom error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error with status/status options, constructor sets status default 500, getResponse() creates Response from exception
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc() client function, parseResponse, DetailedError type exports
+- Internal names noticed: hc(), DetailedError, parseResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Client module entry point exporting the hc() HTTP client and utility functions
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, re-exports hc from ./client and parseResponse/DetailedError from ./utils
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc() client factory, ClientRequestImpl class, createProxy for method routing
+- Internal names noticed: Client, Callback, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, buildSearchParams, deepMerge merge functions, proxy creation
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation with proxy-based API surface for constructing client instances and dispatching requests
+- Copy-safe detail: ~100 lines, Client class factory returns proxy wrapping, ClientRequestImpl holds URL/method/params, hc() creates client via proxy pattern
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: InferResponseType, InferRequestType, Fetch signature, ClientRequest options
+- Internal names noticed: ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Client module type definitions for request responses, client configuration, and Fetch API signatures
+- Copy-safe detail: TypeScript generics for typed client interactions, response type inference from fetch paths and methods
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ObjectType, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utility functions for URL manipulation, path merging, query params, protocol swapping, deep merging objects, response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, URL path utilities, search param builder, http-to-ws swaps, deepMerge for config, parseResponse converts Response to data or throws DetailedError
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP(), DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses Set, detectResponseType, DetailedError with statusCode/detail/code/log
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Minimalized fetch result parser that detects JSON/text, parses body, throws DetailedError on non-OK status
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, sets null responses, detect content-type header, return _data or throw DetailedError with status info
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire() function exports
+- Internal names noticed: handle, fire, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter that registers Hono app with fetch_event handler
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, fire() calls addEventListener('fetch', handle(app, options)), binds custom fetch to globalThis
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle() function
+- Internal names noticed: Handler, FetchEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types (from ./types for FetchEvent)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch handler that passes request through Hono app, falls back to native fetch on 404
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, handle() returns function receiving FetchEvent, calls app.fetch with FetchEvent request, responds with Promise-like Response
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, ExtendableEvent (waitUntil)
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker type definitions including FetchEvent with clientId, request, and respondWith method
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, exports FetchEvent interface extending Event with preloadResponse and respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to complete this benchmark task by:
1. Creating the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Reading all the listed files from the repository
3. Creating a markdown file with specific formatting requirements

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the listed files.
